announcement.title: 🎆 Independence Day — declaring independence from on-call
announcement.body: All weekend, 2x rewards plus bonus gear drops. Even the pager system is taking PTO. Snag the Star-Spangled Bundle on the Shop tab — fireworks not included (your team would just escalate them anyway).

shop.title: Star-Spangled Bundle
shop.description: 1500 💎 gems, 150 ✦ shards, 7 🎫 access cards. Long weekend prices, one-time per account.
